metadata.title: Joshua Fit the Battle of Jericho
metadata.subtitle: African American spiritual (also "Joshua Fought the Battle of Jericho")
metadata.lyricist: Traditional African American spiritual, dating to the early 19th century
metadata.x_pd_basis: Traditional African American spiritual from the early-to-mid 19th century, with the Fisk Jubilee Singers' arrangement first published 1872. PD by > 150 years
